why: Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:custom_query_answer must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. The official null-payload fixture body is transaction id plus the nullable payload marker; this is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only, not plugin channel handling, custom payload semantics, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 2, official custom_query_answer body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Login serverbound version table has no mapping for official packet id 0x02.
stop_boundary: Implement only the Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:custom_query_answer / 0x02 packet id mapping needed for the exact oracle test. Do not change official answers, broaden login runtime behavior, infer plugin channel handling, add login acknowledgement, or add later Login packets.
